scope: fixture-first review decisions for PP&D public-source and read-only safety packets

required_before_promotion: all unresolved blockers closed in a later ledger
human operator approval recorded outside fixture bootstrap

review_decisions.decision_rationale: Fixture confirms the delta summary packet shape, but no live public-source recrawl has been operator-reviewed for promotion.

unresolved_blockers.reason: Operator has not reviewed a current official-source delta report against production promotion criteria.

review_decisions.decision_rationale: Fixture records that explanation audit output must remain advisory until source citations and refusal boundaries receive operator signoff.

unresolved_blockers.reason: Guardrail explanations have not been compared by an operator against source evidence and consequential-action refusal requirements.

review_decisions.decision_rationale: Fixture preserves local PDF preview as a safe dry-run surface only; no official upload, certification, or submission is approved.

unresolved_blockers.reason: PDF preview safety has not been operator-approved for production document preparation or official filing.

review_decisions.decision_rationale: Read-only DevHub observation remains blocked for production promotion until attended-session boundaries are separately verified without storing private browser artifacts.

unresolved_blockers.reason: No operator-attended DevHub read-only observation checklist has been approved for promotion, and no private session files may be committed.
